title: About me (personal)
content:
I'm originally from Amsterdam, but currently based in 'the village' of Haarlem. Outside of work, I play the trumpet, build my own video game in my spare time, and stay active through gym, biking, and kickboxing.
One of my favourite things about Generative AI is how much the barrier to picking up something new has dropped. I feel like it a lot easier to get started to learning something, without the ceiling being lowered.
If you want to talk shop about agentic AI, swap video (game) dev stories, or anything in between feel free to reach out!
